zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll於1342年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安波爾維其可時，他的父親David de la Haye 6th Lord of Errol24歲，母親Margaret Keith22歲。他於1372年11月13日與Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland在蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1406年7月14日在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵享年64歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾培斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll于1342年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安波爾維其可时，他的父亲David de la Haye 6th Lord of Errol24岁，母亲Margaret Keith22岁。他于1372年11月13日与Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland在苏格兰艾斯爾登東納爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1406年7月14日在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵享年64岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾培斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Haye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Helmut, Willi.

North German, East Frisian, and Dutch: from a personal name, Frisian Hajo, ancient Germanic Haio; or from a short form of the female name Hadewig, composed of the elements hadu ‘battle, strife’ + wīg ‘war’.
German: variant of   Hey   4, 5.

variants.name: Deshayes
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived by an enclosure, from the plural of Old French haye ‘hedge’ (see Haye and Hayes ), with fused preposition and definite article des ‘from the’; or a habitational name denoting someone from Les Hayes, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Deshaies .

variants.name: Hayenga
meanings: East Frisian: patronymic from the personal name Hajo (see Haye 1). It is formed with the suffix -enga, a variant of -inga (from the patronymic suffix -ing and genitive plural ending -a).

variants.name: Hey
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hay  .
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized (or archaic) and Flemish, of Heij, a topographic name for someone who lived on a heath, Dutch hei, heide.
German: metonymic occupational name for a grower or mower of grass, from Middle High German höu ‘grass, hay’.

variants.name: Hayen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse.  German Heinz, Wilhelm.
Flemish, East Frisian, and North German: patronymic from   Haye   1.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll was born in 1342, in Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, David de la Haye 6th Lord of Errol, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Keith, was 22. He married Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland on 13 November 1372, in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 14 July 1406, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 64, and was buried in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll est né en 1342, à Borthwick, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, David de la Haye 6th Lord of Errol, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Keith, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland le 13 novembre 1372, à Dundonald, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 juillet 1406, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll 1342 in Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater David de la Haye 6th Lord of Errol 24 und seine Mutter Margaret Keith 22. Er hat am 13. November 1372 in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Juli 1406 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland und wurde in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll è nato il nel 1342 nel Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland, il suo padre, David de la Haye 6th Lord of Errol, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Keith, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland il 13 novembre 1372, nel Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 luglio 1406, nel Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Perth, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Errollが1342年にスコットランドミドロスアンボルスウィックで生まれた時，父David de la Haye 6th Lord of Errolは24歳，母Margaret Keithは22歳であった。1372年11月13日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアダンドナルドでElizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1406年7月14日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンで64歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll(이)가 1342년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 볼스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David de la Haye 6th Lord of Errol(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Keith(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1372년 11월 13일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 던도널드에서 Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1406년 7월 14일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll nasceu em 1342, em Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, David de la Haye 6th Lord of Errol, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Keith, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland em 13 de novembro de 1372, em Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de julho de 1406, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland.

ro.Neville's Cross, Durham, England: Neville's Cross, Durham, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de la Haye 7th Lord of Erroll родился в 1342 г. в местности бортвикк, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени David de la Haye 6th Lord of Errol было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Keith, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland 13 ноября 1372 г. в местности дундональд, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 14 июля 1406 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland el 13 de noviembre de 1372, en Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de julio de 1406, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland.
